center.name: 麻雀科
center.summary: 麻雀科是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联17种鸟类，包括White-browed sparrow-weaver、斑文鳥、Pale rockfinch等17种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|right|An illustration of an Arabian golden sparrow (above) and a yellow-throated petronia (below) by [[Henrik Grönvold]] The Arabian golden sparrow (Passer euchlorus) is a sparrow found in south west Arabia and also the coast of Somalia and Djibouti where it occurs in thorn savannah and scrub habitats

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The desert sparrow (Passer simplex) is a species of bird in the sparrow family Passeridae, found in the Sahara Desert of northern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Kenya sparrow (Passer rufocinctus), also known as the Kenya rufous sparrow, is a sparrow found in Kenya and Tanzania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pale rockfinch or pale rock sparrow (Carpospiza brachydactyla) is a small sparrow found in the Middle East and Central Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The plain-backed sparrow (Passer flaveolus), also called the Pegu sparrow or olive-backed sparrow, is a sparrow found in Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|A detail of an illustration by Henrik Grönvold, showing a male Shelley's sparrow Shelley's sparrow (Passer shelleyi), also known as Shelley's rufous sparrow or the White Nile rufous sparrow, is a sparrow found in eastern Africa from South Sudan, southern Ethiopia, and north-western Somalia to northern Uganda and north-western Kenya. Formerly, it was considered as a subspecies of the Kenya sparrow. This species is named after English geologist and ornithologist George Ernest Shelley

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Somali sparrow (Passer castanopterus) is a species of bird in the family Passeridae found in Somalia, Djibouti, Ethiopia and Kenya

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: melanorhynchus, Lake Baringo, Kenya | image2 = White-browed Sparrow Weaver (Plocepasser mahali) (022A-WA03044X0028-0011M0).ogg | image2_caption = Song recorded in southwest Kenya | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | taxon = Plocepasser mahali | authority = Smith, 1836 }} The white-browed sparrow-weaver (Plocepasser mahali) is a predominantly brown, sparrow-sized bird found throughout central and north-central southern Africa. It is found in groups of two to eleven individuals consisting of one breeding pair and other non-reproductive individuals

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The authorship of the generic name Gymnoris|journal=Zoologische Mededelingen|location=Leiden|volume=80|issue=5|pages=185–188|url=http://www.zoologischemededelingen.nl/80/nr05/a11|archive-date=24 July 2011|access-date=16 June 2009|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20110724173835/http://www.zoologischemededelingen.nl/80/nr05/a11}} }} The yellow-throated sparrow or chestnut-shouldered petronia (Gymnoris xanthocollis) is a species of sparrow found in southern Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Zarudny's sparrow (Passer zarudnyi), also known as the Asian desert sparrow, is a species of bird in the sparrow family Passeridae, which occurs in Uzbekistan, Turkmenistan, and formerly in Iran. This species has historically been classified as a subspecies of the desert sparrow, which is otherwise restricted to Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Cape sparrow (Passer melanurus), or mossie, is a bird of the sparrow family Passeridae found in southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Brehm]], 1855 Passer engimaticus Zarudny, 1903 Passer ahasvar Kleinschmidt, 1904 }} thumb|An audio recording of a house sparrow The house sparrow (Passer domesticus) is a bird of the sparrow family Passeridae, found in most parts of the world

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: nisoriaBali, Indonesia | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Lonchura | species = punctulata | authority = (Linnaeus, 1758) | range_map = Areale Lonchura punctulata.jpg | range_map_alt = Native range | range_map_caption = Native range | synonyms = *Loxia punctulata }} The scaly-breasted munia or spotted munia (Lonchura punctulata), known in the pet trade as nutmeg mannikin or spice finch, is a sparrow-sized estrildid finch native to tropical Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: A.|title=On the original description of Passer iagoensis motitensis Smith|journal=Bulletin of the British Ornithologists' Club|volume=84|issue=6|year=1964|page=110}} }} The great sparrow (Passer motitensis), also known as the southern rufous sparrow, is found in southern Africa in dry, wooded savannah and towns. This is a 15–16 cm long sparrow superficially like a large house sparrow

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: italiae | synonyms = * Fringilla italiae Vieillot, 1817 * Fringilla cisalpina Temminck, 1820 * Pyrgita cisalpina (Temminck, 1820) Gould, 1830 * Passer domesticus cisalpinus (Temminck, 1820) Schegel, 1844 }} The Italian sparrow (Passer italiae), also known as the cisalpine sparrow, is a passerine bird of the sparrow family Passeridae, found in Italy and other parts of the Mediterranean region

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | taxon = Passer luteus | authority = (Lichtenstein, MHC, 1823) | synonyms_ref = | synonyms = * Fringilla lutea Lichtenstein, 1823 }} The Sudan golden sparrow (Passer luteus) is a small species of bird in the sparrow family found in sub-Saharan Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The saxaul sparrow (Passer ammodendri) is a passerine bird of the sparrow family (Passeridae), found in parts of Central Asia
